Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: hair accessories [300225910], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Open-meshed nets made of human hair, silk or synthetics, worn over the hair to keep it in place. Also includes those studded with pearl-like ornaments.
Red abierta realizada de pelo humano, seda o tejidos sintéticos, que se lleva sobre el pelo para mantenerlo en su sitio. También incluye aquéllos adornados con ornamentos similares a las perlas.

Opengewerkte netjes gemaakt van mensenhaar, zijde of synthetische materialen die over het haar worden gedragen om het op de plaats te houden. Ook te gebruiken voor soorten die zijn bezet met parelachtige versieringen.
開放式網孔的網子，由真人頭髮、絲或合成材料製成，戴在頭髮上以固定位置。也包含綴有類似珍珠飾品的髮網。

Offenmaschiges Netz, das aus menschlichem Haar, Seide oder Synthetik hergestellt wird, über den Haaren getragen, um diese am Platz zu halten. Hierzu gehören auch solche, die mir perlenähnlichem Schmuck versehen sind.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
